name: Coats Group PLC
description: World-leading manufacturer of industrial thread and structural components for the apparel and footwear industries. Global operations in 50+ countries with c.19,000 employees. Acquired OrthoLite (premium insoles) in Oct 2025. Reports in USD, converted to GBP at 1.27.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Revenue $1,465m in FY2025 (flat organic, +2% reported). Global market leader in premium thread (~27% Apparel share, ~30% Footwear share). OrthoLite acquisition adds premium insoles. Target >5% revenue CAGR through the cycle. Recycled thread revenue $554m (+43% CER). Target adjacencies (safety fabrics, energy tapes, Coats Digital) contributed 1% of Group revenue growth.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Adjusted EBIT margin 19.8% in FY2025 (+80bps). Upgraded medium-term target to 21-23% (from 19-21%) following OrthoLite addition. Pricing discipline, operational excellence and mix improvement. OrthoLite margin accretive. Apparel margin 20.2%, Footwear 23.9%.
assumptions.risks: Net debt $815m / leverage 2.2x following OrthoLite acquisition (target <2x by end 2026). FX exposure (reports in USD, UK-listed). Tariff uncertainty from April 2025. Consumer demand cyclicality. Adj EPS declined 5% in FY2025 due to higher interest and dilution from equity raise. Integration risk with OrthoLite.
assumptions.catalyst: OrthoLite integration synergies ($20m annualised by 2028). Deleveraging to <2x by end 2026. Upgraded medium-term target: c.$1bn cumulative FCF over 5 years. New two-division structure (Apparel + Footwear) from H1 2026. Record FCF of $160m in FY2025 (pre-dividends/M&A). Progressive dividend (+5% in FY2025).
